scripts.dev:mobile:pods: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.gem/ruby/2.6.0/bin:$PATH" && cd apps/zephyr-mobile/ios && pod install'
scripts.dev:mobile:android: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'cd apps/zephyr-mobile && flutter run --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000'
scripts.dev:mobile:ios: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'cd apps/zephyr-mobile && flutter run --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000'
scripts.check:backend: pnpm check:realtime && pnpm --filter zephyr-api test && pnpm --filter zephyr-api test:e2e && pnpm check:db:race && pnpm --filter zephyr-api build
scripts.check:mobile: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'cd apps/zephyr-mobile && flutter analyze && flutter test'
scripts.check:realtime: pnpm test:rtdb:rules && pnpm test:firestore:rules && pnpm test:storage:rules
scripts.test:rtdb:rules: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.firebase-config firebase emulators:exec --project zephyr-rtdb-rules-test --only database "node --test tests/rtdb/rules.test.mjs"
scripts.test:firestore:rules: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.firebase-config firebase emulators:exec --project zephyr-firestore-rules-test --only firestore "node --test tests/firestore/rules.test.mjs"
scripts.test:storage:rules: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.firebase-config firebase emulators:exec --project zephyr-storage-rules-test --only firestore,storage "node --test tests/storage/rules.test.mjs"
